response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack and Linux experience, plus relevant open-source work and some teaching/mentoring background. However, the resume shows no formal leadership/management roles, limited explicit architecture/UML credentials, and German is only at basic level — well below the required C1, which is a hard requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive senior engineering experience across web, embedded, and Linux/open-source stacks
Demonstrated mentoring via workshops, courses, and dojos plus founder-level project ownership
Strong full-stack and polyglot background (Node, TypeScript, Python-adjacent, DLang, Java)
concerns: German listed as Basic — far below the required C1 proficiency
No formal Head of Development / team lead role; leadership is implied, not proven
UML, requirements management, and IT-security/compliance experience not explicitly evidenced

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership track record
